purpose: Canonical mapping from CAUCHY internal feature names to paper notation. All paper text must use paper_name. All JSON traceability references retain internal_name.

critical_clarification.summary: ALL features in CAUCHY Ramo A are computed from H1 (β₁, 1-cycles, loops/filaments). There are NO H2 (β₂) features in the current Ramo A pipeline. The internal naming convention 'b2_*' refers to feature vector index position (5,6,7), NOT to Betti number β₂.
critical_clarification.consequence_for_paper: The main detection feature 'b2_mean_persistence' must be presented as β₁ mean persistence in the paper. The claim is about loop/filament topology, not void topology.
critical_clarification.consequence_for_r3_5: The R3-5 gap (β₂ contribution) remains open: no β₂ (H2, 3D voids) features are present in the current pipeline. The Reviewer concern about β₂ distinctiveness vs Prat et al. 2025 is correct — no quantitative evidence of β₂ contribution exists in current results.
critical_clarification.source: phase5_hod_b3.py compute_tda_features: diag_1 = persistence_intervals_in_dimension(1) = H1 = β₁

b2_mean_persistence.physical_meaning: Mean persistence of H1 features (loops, filamentary cycles) across threshold filtration
b2_mean_persistence.paper_role: PRIMARY DETECTION FEATURE — +3.09σ anomaly in DESI BGS NGC
b2_mean_persistence.direction: DESI > mocks (higher mean persistence = topologically more defined loops)
b2_mean_persistence.footnote_text: Throughout this paper we use ⟨pers₁⟩ to denote the mean persistence of H₁ generators, referred to as 'b2_mean_persistence' in the internal CAUCHY codebase (where the prefix 'b2' denotes feature vector index 5, not Betti number β₂).

b2_max_count.physical_meaning: Maximum β₁ count across all filtration thresholds
b2_max_count.direction: DESI << mocks (far fewer loops at peak)
b2_max_count.note: Anomalous in opposite direction to b2_mean_persistence — scientifically important contrast

b2_high_persist.physical_meaning: Count of H1 features with persistence above 90th percentile

b1_peak_pos.physical_meaning: Threshold value at which β₁ curve reaches maximum

b1_peak_height.physical_meaning: Peak height of β₁ Betti curve

b1_fwhm.physical_meaning: Full width at half maximum of β₁ Betti curve

b1_integral.physical_meaning: Integral of β₁ Betti curve over all thresholds

b0_at_mean.physical_meaning: β₀ count (connected components) at mean field threshold

beta2_status.explanation: H2 (β₂, 3D voids) persistence is NOT computed in the current Ramo A pipeline. The CubicalComplex gudhi computation could in principle yield H2 features, but compute_tda_features in phase5_hod_b3.py only extracts persistence_intervals_in_dimension(1).
beta2_status.r3_5_gap: OPEN — no quantitative evidence of β₂ contribution to DESI signal exists. This is the gap identified by the Reviewer (OC-5). A minimum viable response is an order-of-magnitude estimate of β₂ sensitivity from existing gudhi computations.
beta2_status.paper_implication: The paper cannot claim β₂ (3D void) detection without adding β₂ features to the pipeline. The current claim is β₁ (loop/filament) topology anomaly. This must be stated clearly in the paper.
beta2_status.mitigation_for_paper: The paper can note that β₁ encodes the connectivity of the filamentary cosmic web — distinct from 2D projected statistics (Prat et al. 2025) which access only 2D cycles. The 3D nature of β₁ (not β₂) remains distinctive vs any 2D analysis.

physical_interpretation_of_detection.what_is_detected: DESI BGS NGC shows significantly higher mean H₁ persistence (⟨pers₁⟩ = 0.459 vs mock mean 0.239, +11.85σ) combined with significantly fewer H₁ generators at peak (β₁_max = 29683 vs mock 133786, −55.6σ).
physical_interpretation_of_detection.interpretation: DESI galaxy field has fewer filamentary loops than expected under ΛCDM, but the loops that exist are significantly more persistent (more topologically robust). This pattern — fewer but more persistent 1-cycles — is consistent with a cosmic web that has undergone stronger void expansion, as expected for w₀ < −1 (phantom crossing).
physical_interpretation_of_detection.b2_max_count_b2_mean_persistence_anticor: The opposite signs of b2_max_count (−55.6σ) and b2_mean_persistence (+11.85σ) are physically consistent: phantom crossing suppresses small transient loops while amplifying persistent large-scale topological structures. This dual signature strengthens the physical interpretation.
physical_interpretation_of_detection.paper_section: Results §4.2 — Physical interpretation of topological anomaly

sigma_px_matched_feature_used: b2_mean_persistence (⟨pers₁⟩) — Confronto B, σ_px=0.640, N=2000 nwLH mocks
main_result: +3.09σ anomaly in ⟨pers₁⟩ (DESI BGS NGC vs Quijote nwLH, Gate 6)
